title: Sugar Crunchy Delight
description: A savory and crowd-pleasing Japanese dessert that is crispy on the outside and soft on the inside, made with light brown sugar for a delightful low-carb treat.
instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine the light brown sugar and corn starch. Mix well until combined.
Add coconut oil and vanilla extract into the mixture, continuing to stir until everything is incorporated evenly.
Transfer the mixture to an air fryer safe baking sheet or dish, spreading it out into a thin layer. Use the back of a spoon or spatula for even distribution.

Air fry for 10-12 minutes, shaking the pan halfway through cooking time to ensure even browning. The sugar should start to caramelize and become crunchy on the outside while remaining soft in the center.
Allow it to cool completely before serving.
